name: WTO Marrakesh Agreement 1994 (World Trade Organization)
summary: The Marrakesh Agreement Establishing the World Trade Organization (WTO Marrakesh Agreement) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-WTO-treaty framework adopted by the 123 founding states in Marrakesh — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-trade-cooperation framework + successor to GATT 1947 framework (WTO Marrakesh Agreement adopted 15 April 1994 in Marrakesh Morocco + effective 1 January 1995 succeeding GATT 1947 — formal foundational WTO treaty framework establishing comprehensive WTO organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-trade frameworks which operate as regional or bilateral frameworks, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-trade-cooperation framework + successor to GATT 1947 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Single Undertaking framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal consensus-based-decision-making framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Most-Favoured-Nation MFN + National-Treatment-NT framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Dispute-Settlement-Understanding-paralysed framework via US Trump-administration-Appellate-Body-paralysis-since-December-2019 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Doha-Development-Round-Stalled framework since 2008 collapse), as the central jurisdiction of the formal WTO Dispute Settlement Understanding DSU framework (WTO Dispute Settlement Understanding DSU framework providing formal binding-state-state dispute-settlement framework via Dispute Settlement Body DSB + Panel + Appellate Body framework + Multi-Party Interim Appeal Arbitration Arrangement MPIA framework effective from 30 April 2020 in response to Appellate-Body-paralysis framework — formal foundational WTO dispute-settlement framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal binding-state-state dispute-settlement framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal MPIA framework as Appellate-Body-paralysis workaround framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal WTO Doha Development Round + Bali + Nairobi + Buenos Aires + MC13 Geneva + MC14 Cameroon framework (WTO Doha Development Round launched 14 November 2001 + Bali MC9 December 2013 + Nairobi MC10 December 2015 + Buenos Aires MC11 December 2017 + Geneva MC12 12-17 June 2022 + Abu Dhabi MC13 26 February - 2 March 2024 + Cameroon MC14 2026 framework — formal foundational WTO Ministerial Conference framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal biennial Ministerial Conference framework with formal Doha-Development-Round-Stalled-since-2008 framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal WTO Multilateral Trade Agreements framework (WTO Multilateral Trade Agreements framework providing formal GATT 1994 + GATS 1994 + TRIPS 1994 + DSU 1994 + Trade Policy Review Mechanism TPRM 1994 + Government Procurement Agreement GPA 1994 + Trade Facilitation Agreement TFA effective 22 February 2017 + Fisheries Subsidies Agreement effective 27 September 2024 — formal foundational WTO multilateral-trade-agreements framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal multilateral-trade-agreements framework). The WTO Marrakesh Agreement is binding upon 166 WTO member states as of 2026 + 23 WTO observer states with notable non-members North Korea + Eritrea + Turkmenistan + Vatican framework + Russia suspended-since-2022-Western-sanctions framework — substantial universal coverage framework. The Agreement is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal WTO TRIPS framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal WTO-TRIPS-on-Family-Education-Materials framework not directly addressing family-law-issues framework. The WTO Ministerial Conference + WTO General Council + WTO Director-General + WTO DSB + WTO Appellate Body (paralysed) + WTO MPIA are the formal WTO bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The WTO Marrakesh Agreement is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: WTO Marrakesh Agreement
statutory_framework.relevance: Marrakesh Agreement Establishing the World Trade Organization adopted 15 April 1994 in Marrakesh Morocco + effective 1 January 1995 succeeding GATT 1947 — formal foundational WTO treaty framework establishing comprehensive WTO organisation framework.

statutory_framework.title: GATT 1947
statutory_framework.relevance: General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade GATT 1947 adopted 30 October 1947 in Geneva Switzerland + effective 1 January 1948 — predecessor framework to WTO Marrakesh Agreement.

statutory_framework.title: WTO DSU
statutory_framework.relevance: Understanding on Rules and Procedures Governing the Settlement of Disputes WTO DSU adopted 15 April 1994 + effective 1 January 1995 — formal foundational WTO dispute-settlement framework.

statutory_framework.title: WTO TFA
statutory_framework.relevance: WTO Trade Facilitation Agreement TFA adopted 7 December 2013 + effective 22 February 2017 — formal foundational WTO trade-facilitation framework.

statutory_framework.citation: MPIA Multi-Party Interim Appeal Arbitration Arrangement 2020
statutory_framework.title: WTO MPIA
statutory_framework.relevance: Multi-Party Interim Appeal Arbitration Arrangement MPIA effective from 30 April 2020 — formal foundational WTO MPIA Appellate-Body-paralysis workaround framework.

statutory_framework.title: WTO Fisheries Subsidies Agreement
statutory_framework.relevance: WTO Fisheries Subsidies Agreement adopted 17 June 2022 + effective 27 September 2024 — formal foundational WTO fisheries-subsidies framework.

apex_courts.name: WTO Ministerial Conference
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for WTO.

apex_courts.name: WTO Director-General
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for WTO.

apex_courts.name: WTO Appellate Body (paralysed since 11 December 2019)
apex_courts.role: Formal WTO Appellate Body paralysed by US-blocking-of-appointments-since-2019 framework.

apex_courts.name: WTO MPIA Multi-Party Interim Appeal Arbitration Arrangement
apex_courts.role: Formal WTO MPIA Appellate-Body-paralysis workaround framework body.

anonymisation_convention: WTO-related communications operate via state-state framework via WTO DSB + WTO Ministerial Conference; individual communications not formally accepted under WTO framework.

key_developments.title: GATT 1947 adopted
key_developments.description: General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade GATT 1947 adopted 30 October 1947 in Geneva Switzerland — predecessor framework to WTO Marrakesh Agreement adopted.

key_developments.title: Uruguay Round launched
key_developments.description: Uruguay Round of multilateral trade negotiations launched 20 September 1986 in Punta del Este Uruguay — formal foundational WTO negotiation framework.

key_developments.title: WTO Marrakesh Agreement signed
key_developments.description: Marrakesh Agreement Establishing the World Trade Organization signed 15 April 1994 in Marrakesh Morocco by 123 founding states — formal foundational WTO treaty framework adopted.

key_developments.title: WTO operations begin
key_developments.description: WTO Marrakesh Agreement entered force 1 January 1995 + WTO operations began 1 January 1995 — formal foundational WTO treaty framework operational.

key_developments.title: Doha Development Round launched + China joins WTO
key_developments.description: Doha Development Round launched 14 November 2001 at WTO MC4 Doha Qatar + China joined WTO 11 December 2001 — formal foundational WTO Doha Development Round + China-WTO-accession framework.

key_developments.title: Doha Round collapse
key_developments.description: Doha Development Round collapsed 29 July 2008 at WTO Mini-Ministerial Geneva — formal WTO Doha-Development-Round-Stalled framework operational.

key_developments.title: Russia joins WTO
key_developments.description: Russia joined WTO 22 August 2012 — formal foundational Russia-WTO-accession framework.

key_developments.title: WTO Appellate Body paralysed
key_developments.description: WTO Appellate Body paralysed 11 December 2019 by US-blocking-of-appointments-since-2017-Trump-administration framework — formal WTO Appellate Body paralysis framework operational.

key_developments.title: MPIA Multi-Party Interim Appeal Arbitration Arrangement
key_developments.description: Multi-Party Interim Appeal Arbitration Arrangement MPIA effective from 30 April 2020 by 25 WTO members in response to Appellate-Body-paralysis framework — formal foundational WTO MPIA workaround framework operational.

key_developments.title: Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala first female + first African WTO Director-General
key_developments.description: Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala first female + first African WTO Director-General effective 1 March 2021 — formal foundational WTO Director-General framework operational.

key_developments.title: WTO MC12 + Fisheries Subsidies Agreement
key_developments.description: WTO Ministerial Conference MC12 held 12-17 June 2022 in Geneva + Fisheries Subsidies Agreement adopted 17 June 2022 — formal WTO MC12 framework operational.

key_developments.title: WTO MC13 Abu Dhabi + Fisheries Subsidies Agreement effective
key_developments.description: WTO Ministerial Conference MC13 held 26 February - 2 March 2024 in Abu Dhabi UAE + Fisheries Subsidies Agreement effective 27 September 2024 — formal WTO MC13 + Fisheries Subsidies framework operational.

key_developments.title: WTO MC14 Cameroon
key_developments.description: WTO Ministerial Conference MC14 scheduled for 2026 in Cameroon — first WTO Ministerial Conference held in Africa framework.

structural_findings: WTO Marrakesh Agreement operates a supranational global binding-treaty framework — places WTO Marrakesh Agreement in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-trade-cooperation framework + successor to GATT 1947 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-trade-cooperation framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Single Undertaking framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal consensus-based-decision-making framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Most-Favoured-Nation MFN + National-Treatment-NT framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Dispute-Settlement-Understanding-paralysed framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Doha-Development-Round-Stalled framework since 2008 collapse.

Central jurisdiction of formal WTO DSU framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal binding-state-state dispute-settlement framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal MPIA framework as Appellate-Body-paralysis workaround framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal WTO Doha Development Round + Bali + Nairobi + Buenos Aires + MC13 Geneva + MC14 Cameroon framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal biennial Ministerial Conference framework with formal Doha-Development-Round-Stalled-since-2008 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal WTO Multilateral Trade Agreements framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal multilateral-trade-agreements framework.

166 WTO member state + 23 observer state ratification framework with notable non-members North Korea + Eritrea + Turkmenistan + Vatican framework is structurally distinctive globally — substantial universal coverage framework.

1947 GATT + 1986 Uruguay Round + 1994 WTO Marrakesh Agreement + 1995 entry into force + 2001 Doha Round + China joins + 2008 Doha collapse + 2012 Russia joins + 2019 Appellate Body paralysed + 2020 MPIA + 2021 Okonjo-Iweala + 2022 MC12 + Fisheries Subsidies + 2024 MC13 + Fisheries effective + 2026 MC14 Cameroon WTO-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

WTO Marrakesh + GATT 1994 + GATS + TRIPS + DSU + TFA + Fisheries Subsidies + MPIA formal octet framework with limited PA-intersection framework via formal WTO-TRIPS-on-Family-Education-Materials framework not directly addressing family-law-issues framework — distinctive in operating limited PA-intersection framework relative to other global supranational frameworks.
editorial_notes: WTO Marrakesh Agreement jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global foundational-WTO-treaty meta-framework (WTO Marrakesh Agreement 1994/1995 + GATT 1947 predecessor + GATT 1994 + GATS + TRIPS + DSU + TFA 2014/2017 + Fisheries Subsidies 2022/2024 + MPIA 2020 + Doha Development Round 2001/2008 collapse + Appellate Body paralysed 2019 + China 2001 + Russia 2012 + Okonjo-Iweala 2021 + MC12 2022 + MC13 2024 Abu Dhabi + MC14 2026 Cameroon). Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-trade-cooperation framework globally + successor to GATT 1947 + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Single Undertaking framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal consensus-based-decision-making framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Most-Favoured-Nation MFN + National-Treatment-NT framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Dispute-Settlement-Understanding-paralysed framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Doha-Development-Round-Stalled framework + central jurisdiction of formal WTO DSU + MPIA workaround framework + central jurisdiction of formal Ministerial Conference framework + central jurisdiction of formal multilateral-trade-agreements framework + 166 WTO member states + 23 observer states + 1947 GATT + 1986 Uruguay Round + 1994 WTO Marrakesh Agreement + 1995 entry into force + 2001 Doha + China + 2008 Doha collapse + 2012 Russia + 2019 Appellate Body paralysed + 2020 MPIA + 2021 Okonjo-Iweala + 2022 MC12 + 2024 MC13 + 2026 MC14 Cameroon WTO-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: WTO TRIPS framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal WTO-TRIPS-on-Family-Education-Materials framework not directly addressing family-law-issues framework — distinctive in operating limited PA-intersection framework relative to other global supranational frameworks.

Joins global + supranational + foundational-WTO-treaty cluster + WTO-Marrakesh-only-global-supranational-binding-treaty-on-international-trade-cooperation-globally-distinctive + GATT-1947-predecessor + Single-Undertaking + consensus-based-decision-making + Most-Favoured-Nation-MFN + National-Treatment-NT + WTO-DSU-Dispute-Settlement-Understanding + WTO-Appellate-Body-paralysed-since-December-2019-US-blocking + MPIA-Multi-Party-Interim-Appeal-Arbitration-Arrangement-2020-25-members + WTO-Doha-Development-Round-launched-2001-stalled-2008 + 166-WTO-member-states + 23-observer-states + North-Korea-Eritrea-Turkmenistan-Vatican-non-members + China-joined-2001 + Russia-joined-2012-suspended-2022-Western-sanctions + Ngozi-Okonjo-Iweala-2021-first-female-first-African-DG + MC12-Geneva-2022 + MC13-Abu-Dhabi-2024 + MC14-Cameroon-2026-first-Africa-MC + GATT-GATS-TRIPS-DSU-TFA-Fisheries-Subsidies + WTO-TRIPS-on-Family-Education-Materials-PA-intersection clusters within the corpus.
